summary: Created custom frameless title bar for dockym replacing native OS window decoration
features: Qt.FramelessWindowHint removes native OS window decorations
Custom title bar with app icon + 'Dockym' title text
Minimize, maximize/restore, close buttons with hover effects
Draggable title bar area (mouse drag to move window)
Window edge resizing with 8px resize handles (all 8 directions)
System tray toggle button in title bar
Docker connection status indicator (events indicator) in title bar
Running/total service count badge in title bar
Theme-aware styling for all title bar elements (dark, light, vscode, claude)
notes: Header bar simplified: events indicator and count moved from header to title bar
Header bar retains 'Proyectos · Docker services' context info
Menu bar remains below title bar
Edge resize handles work on all 8 edges/corners
Cursor changes to appropriate resize arrow when hovering edges
